# boundsIgnoreFraming | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

- [ CGWindowImageOption ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption)

-  boundsIgnoreFraming 

Type Property# boundsIgnoreFraming

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
static var boundsIgnoreFraming: CGWindowImageOption { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/boundsignoreframing#Discussion)

When the requested capture rectangle is [`CGRectNull`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgrectnull), using this option captures the window area only and does not capture the area occupied by any window framing effects.

## [See Also](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/boundsignoreframing#see-also)

### [Type Properties](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/boundsignoreframing#Type-Properties)

[`static var bestResolution: CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/bestresolution)When capturing the window, return the best image resolution. The returned image size may be different than the screen size.[`static var nominalResolution: CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/nominalresolution)When capturing the window, return the nominal image resolution. The returned image size is the same as the screen size.[`static var onlyShadows: CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/onlyshadows)[`static var shouldBeOpaque: CGWindowImageOption`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowimageoption/shouldbeopaque)
